text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

I cannot reproduce this on my 4.6 -STABLE system:

cxterm

setenv LANG zh_TW.Big5
setenv LC_ALL zh_TW.Big5

touch aa<chinese><chinese>  <-- works
touch aa<tab>		    <-- works
touch <paste>		    <-- works

Let me know if this is still a problem for you.

- -Jon
